title: Huge support for Hospice golf day
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Sedgefield Hospice held...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Sedgefield Hospice held a successful golf day at the Knysna Golf Course on Sunday despite a wet start to the morning.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Sedgefield Hospice held a successful golf day at the Knysna Golf Course on Sunday despite a wet start to the morning."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A full field of golfers turned out in support of the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over R65 000 in prizes were generously donated, with a fun raffle featuring a community-filled wheelbarrow won by one of the first-place golfers.","html":"Over R65 000 in prizes were generously donated, with a fun raffle featuring a community-filled wheelbarrow won by one of the first-place golfers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The course was buzzing with energy thanks to exciting activities such as the chipping challenge.","html":"The course was buzzing with energy thanks to exciting activities such as the chipping challenge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The other fun challenge was where golfers had to battle marshmallows over a tee box.","html":"The other fun challenge was where golfers had to battle marshmallows over a tee box."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"One of the organisers of the event, Kim Joubert, thanked all the sponsors involved."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"All funds raised help Knysna Sedgefield Hospice continue providing free, home-based palliative care to those with serious and life-limiting illnesses.","html":"\"All funds raised help Knysna Sedgefield Hospice continue providing free, home-based palliative care to those with serious and life-limiting illnesses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This golf day was a true celebration of community, compassion, and care,\" she said.","html":"\"This golf day was a true celebration of community, compassion, and care,\" she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite initial wet weather, the day turned out great.","html":"Despite initial wet weather, the day turned out great."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
